name: Pasta with Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 1 cup fresh grated Parmesan or Romano cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the meatballs by combining all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Shape into small balls and set aside.
3. In a large skillet, melt butter over medium heat.
4. Add chopped onions and garlic; sauté until softened.
5. Add bacon crumbles to the skillet and cook until browned.
6. Stir in Marsala wine and dried oregano; simmer for 2-3 minutes.
7. Add the meatballs to the skillet and cover the pan.
8. Reduce heat to low and add vermicelli pasta.
9. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the pasta is tender and coated with sauce.
10. Sprinkle Parmesan or Romano cheese over the dish and serve hot.
